Innovator Launches the Equity Managed Floor ETF™ (SFLR), a Unique Core Portfolio Investment Strategy Designed to Address Tail Risk in Stocks

overview.description: The Innovator Equity Managed Floor ETF (SFLR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to participate in market appreciation by holding a portfolio of large-cap US stocks while hedging the downside risk. The fund utilizes four, one-year FLEX options packages with staggered three-month expiration dates to target a maximum loss of 8-12% on a rolling 12-month basis SFLR was launched on Nov 8, 2022 and is issued by Innovator.

data.title: Innovator Launches the Equity Managed Floor ETF™ (SFLR), a Unique Core Portfolio Investment Strategy Designed to Address Tail Risk in Stocks
data.text: Innovator Equity Managed Floor ETF™ (SFLR) is a stock-based ETF that seeks to limit the potential for maximum losses, yet also offer upside participation and dividend income.
